<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Current green dot: (42-43, 12-13) = (bottom, right)
# I want to move dark red block to slot 3 [30,12]-[33,17]
# Slot 3 = (top, right) = (38-39, 12-13)

seg = current_frame.segmentation
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nBlocks after click:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
    cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
    min_r, max_r = min(rows), max(rows)
    min_c, max_c = min(cols), max(cols)
    if max_c < 30 and n['pixels'] > 4:
        print(f"  color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, "
              f"bbox=[{min_r},{min_c}]-[{max_r},{max_c}]")

print(f"\nLevel done: {last_action_result.get('done', False)}")

</function>
</tool_call>
